function.content:
---
record_type: outbound_email
created_at: 2026-03-02T18:21:00Z
send_state: draft
to:
  - nina@finance-workflow.example
subject: "Re: Invoice resend request"
attachments:
  - 50_finance/invoices/2025_10_06__eur_000610__inv_0001__northstar_backfill_alpha.md
related_entities:
  - nina
---
Hi Nina,

Resending the requested invoice from 2025-10-06 (Nordstern Finanzsoftware GmbH). It is attached.

Thanks,
Miles

next_step.current_state: Outbox write completed. Verification: attachment path was read earlier; single attachment so ordering rule satisfied; recipient matches canonical nina primary_contact_email; subject with colon-space is correctly quoted. Next required cleanup is deleting processed inbox item.
next_step.observation: Created outbound email record at 60_outbox/outbox/eml_2026-03-02T18-21-00Z.md.

next_step.current_state: Pre-submit verification: Original task was 'Take care of the next message in inbox.' Completed by processing lowest inbox file 00_inbox/000_invoice-request.md, verifying sender identity canonically, locating exact requested invoice, drafting outbound resend record, and deleting processed inbox item. Completeness: only one open inbox item from preflight and file explicitly requested one invoice; processed fully. Correct level: handled email request with canonical header identity + canonical entity + exact invoice file. No arithmetic required.
next_step.observation: Deleted processed inbox file 00_inbox/000_invoice-request.md after creating the outbound resend draft.

function.message: Processed the next inbox item by preparing an outbound invoice resend draft to Nina with the exact requested invoice attached, then removed the handled inbox message.
function.rulebook_notes: Followed mandatory bootstrap (tree/read AGENTS/context), read nested AGENTS in lanes entered, used inbox email header as canonical transport metadata, verified sender against entity primary_contact_email, used sending-email workflow for outbox record format, and deleted inbox item only after full completion.
function.outcome_justification: The inbox request asked to resend the 2025-10-06 Nordstern invoice. Sender from inbox header (nina@finance-workflow.example) matches canonical primary_contact_email in 10_entities/cast/nina.md. Exact invoice file matching date and counterparty was read at 50_finance/invoices/2025_10_06__eur_000610__inv_0001__northstar_backfill_alpha.md. Outbound draft was written to 60_outbox/outbox/eml_2026-03-02T18-21-00Z.md with that attachment, then the processed inbox file was deleted.
